authorization_phrase: Authorize weekly RS trading research master summary memo only.

best_candidates.first_oos_confirmed: s18 (broad 24-name) -- the first candidate in the whole program to clear the full ladder (with a recent-fold caveat).
best_candidates.informative_failure: s19 (independent 24-name) -- showed the EDGE generalizes even when the CANDIDATE is sample-terminal; separated 'edge generalizes' from 'candidate certifiable'.
best_candidates.sample_size_breakthrough: s20 (combined 48-name) -- proved breadth solves the OOS-K9 blocker WITHOUT tuning (M=8 fixed).
best_candidates.strongest_overall: s21 (fresh 48-name) -- the cleanest result: full-ladder OOS_CONFIRMED on a never-tested universe, no selection bias; establishes the weekly RS edge as genuinely generalizing.

s12_mnq_donchian_15_8_breakout_futures.driver: C8 weak-performance / insufficient-sample: IS ~10.37 trades/y -> implied ~21 OOS trades << K9 100 floor; maxDD 37.62% (above 30% concern)
s12_mnq_donchian_15_8_breakout_futures.result: too few trades to certify; no edge established

s13_mnq_rsi2_bidirectional_futures.driver: DR10 REJECT_FAST at P6.5 (turnover x cost-drag)
s13_mnq_rsi2_bidirectional_futures.result: cost-stress rejected; high-turnover mean-reversion did not survive realistic costs

s14_cross_sector_cash_equity.driver: FAIL_SAFETY at P6 IS (K1 sharpe<0 / K2 expectancy<=0)

s16_expanded_donchian_trend.result: IS +$17,130 but OOS NEGATIVE (exp -$21.33/trade, OOS net ~ -$28k) -> classic IS-fit that failed out-of-sample

s17_broad_universe_xmom_monthly.driver: INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE/K9 at P6 IS (85 closed < 100 floor)
s17_broad_universe_xmom_monthly.result: positive-looking but sample-terminal; monthly cadence too few trades. MOTIVATED the cadence pivot to weekly (s18)

s18_broad_24_weekly_rs.driver: full ladder passed; caveat: K13 3/5 + NEGATIVE recent fold F5
s18_broad_24_weekly_rs.result: FIRST full-ladder OOS_CONFIRMED. OOS 117 trades (58.7/y), +$39,786, +$210/trade, sharpe +0.125; recent-fold weakness

s19_independent_24_weekly_rs.driver: INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE/K9 at P10 OOS (87 trades / 43.6/y < 50/y floor)
s19_independent_24_weekly_rs.mechanic: IDENTICAL weekly RS on an independent 24-name universe
s19_independent_24_weekly_rs.result: edge GENERALIZED (OOS +$44,050, +$336/trade -- stronger per-trade than s18; 5/5 K13) BUT the candidate was K9-terminal: turnover fell below the OOS sample floor

s20_combined_48_weekly_rs.driver: full ladder passed; selection caveat: union includes the known-OOS-good s18 basket
s20_combined_48_weekly_rs.mechanic: IDENTICAL weekly RS on the 48-name s18+s19 UNION (M=8 unchanged)
s20_combined_48_weekly_rs.result: broadening the pool to 48 at fixed M=8 STRUCTURALLY SOLVED the s19 OOS-K9 blocker WITHOUT tuning (43.6/y -> 67.2/y). OOS 134 trades, +$60,004, +$353/trade, sharpe +0.214, 5/5 K13. But selection-biased -> a sample-size demonstration, not clean generalization

s21_fresh_48_weekly_rs.driver: full ladder passed on genuinely unseen names; no selection bias
s21_fresh_48_weekly_rs.mechanic: IDENTICAL weekly RS on a FRESH 48-name universe, ZERO overlap (0/48 ever backtested)
s21_fresh_48_weekly_rs.result: the s18/s20 edge GENERALIZES cleanly. OOS 171 trades (85.8/y -- largest K9 margin of the line), +$48,475, +$170.96/trade (MODEST), sharpe +0.144, PF 1.51, +48.47%, 5/5 K13. RESOLVES the s20 selection caveat

diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED. No live path exists by framework design.

failure_taxonomy_s12_s17.cost_DR10: s13 -- high-turnover mean-reversion rejected under realistic cost-stress
failure_taxonomy_s12_s17.negative_edge_FAIL_SAFETY: s14, s15 -- negative in-sample sharpe/expectancy (esp. mean-reversion variants)
failure_taxonomy_s12_s17.oos_generalization_DR4: s16 -- positive IS but negative OOS (in-sample fit that broke out-of-sample)
failure_taxonomy_s12_s17.sample_floor_K9: s12 (parked, ~21 implied OOS), s17 (85 IS < 100) -- too few trades to certify
failure_taxonomy_s12_s17.takeaway: Across s12-s17 the framework REJECTED every candidate on a spread of distinct gates -- the gates are doing their job (no false promotions). Only the weekly cross-sectional relative-strength rotation family (s18+) ever cleared the full ladder.

framework.dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5
framework.key_gates: K1 sharpe<0 / K2 expectancy<=0 = FAIL_SAFETY; K4 maxdd>50% = FAIL_SAFETY; K9 closed>=100 total + OOS>=50/y = INVIOLATE sample floor; DR4 oos-negative-while-is-positive = REJECT_FAST; DR10 v2 (turnover>0.50 AND cost_drag>0.05) = REJECT_FAST; K13 >=3/5 folds + aggregate + K9; FRC (live promotion) NEVER_GRANTED by design

paper_backtest_results_diagnostic_only.disclaimer: ALL figures are PAPER backtest P&L on a $100k notional CSV simulator (split_only daily bars, proxy costs). NONE is real money, live execution, or money-proven. They are DIAGNOSTIC research metrics only.
paper_backtest_results_diagnostic_only.honest_magnitude_note: The clean fresh-universe per-trade edge (s21, +$171) is MODEST and LOWER than the selection-biased s20 (+$353). Generalization is confirmed; magnitude is moderate. Earlier candidates (s12-s17) produced NO certifiable edge.

program_conclusion: The weekly relative-strength rotation line (s18->s21) is the STRONGEST COMPLETED DIAGNOSTIC EDGE in the trading research program and the ONLY line to reach OOS_CONFIRMED -- now clean-generalization-confirmed on a fresh universe (s21). The cross-sectional RS premium is REAL, PORTABLE, and MODEST; its OOS-sample blocker is solvable by breadth without tuning. It remains PERMANENTLY DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY: NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, FRC NEVER_GRANTED. Strongest diagnostic != live-ready.
scope_and_method: Read-only synthesis of the sealed per-candidate lifecycle/terminal/park memos for s12..s21 (committed). This memo modifies NO sealed artifact, runs NO code/backtest/fetch, and promotes NOTHING. All results are PAPER backtests (CSV simulator, $100k notional, split_only daily data, proxy commission 0.005/share min $1 + 1bp slippage) under the DR/K gate framework -- NOT real money, NOT live executions.
title: Trading research MASTER SUMMARY s12->s21 -- full candidate ladder, final status, best candidates, paper-backtest results, failure reasons, and why the weekly RS line is parked DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY (NOT live/paper-ready; FRC NEVER_GRANTED)
why_weekly_rs_is_parked_diagnostic_only_: PERMANENT 6-GATE LIVE-BLOCK + FRC NEVER_GRANTED: by framework design there is NO authorization phrase that promotes any candidate to live/paper/Strategy-Lab. OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC (incl. the clean s21) is a research label, NOT a promotion.

PAPER, NOT MONEY-PROVEN: every result is a CSV-simulator backtest on split_only daily bars with proxy costs -- no broker fills, no slippage realism beyond a 1bp proxy, no live capital, no execution risk, no borrow/financing, no capacity analysis.
MODEST EDGE: the clean generalization edge is real but small per-trade (+$171); generalization != live-grade profitability.
SCOPE: this is a research/diagnostic program; promotion to capital would require gates and infrastructure that do not exist here and were never authorized.

PARKED: the central research question (does the weekly RS edge generalize?) is answered YES (real, portable, modest, DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY) -- further same-mechanic candidates add marginal diagnostic confidence only, and there is no live path regardless. Line catalog: weekly_rs_rotation_line_catalog_s18_s21_diagnostic_only_parked_sealed (b4ee876).
